CasinoRoyalYago
Table of Contents

Class AnimalController

Namespace
Chaos.Api.Controllers
Assembly
Chaos.Api.dll

Controller to manage all animal-related operations (CRUD and necessary queries).

[Authorize]
[ApiController]
[Route("[controller]")]
public class AnimalController : ControllerBase

Constructors

AnimalController(IAnimalService, IUserService)

Controller to manage all animal-related operations (CRUD and necessary queries).

public AnimalController(IAnimalService animalService, IUserService userService)

Parameters

animalService IAnimalService
userService IUserService

Methods

BuyAnimal(Guid, string?)

Plays a slot machine game for the specified animal and removes the animal from the system.

[HttpPost("BuyAnimal")]
public IActionResult BuyAnimal(Guid animalId, string? Name)

Parameters

animalId Guid
Name string

Returns

IActionResult

An HTTP 200 response with the slot machine game result if successful; otherwise, an HTTP 404 response if the animal is not found.

GetAnimalById(Guid)

Retrieves a single animal by its ID.

[HttpGet("AnimalById/{Id}")]
public ActionResult GetAnimalById(Guid Id)

Parameters

Id Guid

The unique identifier of the animal.

Returns

ActionResult

The animal with all its properties.

Remarks

Example request:

GET /Animal/animalById/{Id}

Example response:

{
    "id": "9ba34383-7266-45d7-aa60-c5cef8ddabf0",
    "name": "Yago",
    "typeAnimal": "FLY",
    "age": 1,
    "weight": 0,
    "height": 2,
    "health": "HEALTHY",
    "value": 8
}

GetAnimals()

Retrieves all animals in the list.

[HttpGet("All")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<AnimalResponse>>> GetAnimals()

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<AnimalResponse>>>

A list of animals with their details.

Remarks

Example response:

{
    "animalList": [
        {
            "id": "bab68685-8c98-4e22-83cf-7bf4ffede6c6",
            "name": "232",
            "typeAnimal": "FLY",
            "age": 1,
            "weight": 0,
            "height": 1,
            "health": "RECOVERING",
            "value": 2
        },
        {
            "id": "c4b195bb-4a08-4e24-8803-4049a6acbe5e",
            "name": "Prueba",
            "typeAnimal": "FLY",
            "age": 1,
            "weight": 0,
            "height": 2,
            "health": "SICK",
            "value": 4
        }
    ],
    "totalAnimals": 2
}

GetInitialAnimals()

Creates five random animals. This operation can only be performed once at the start of the game.

[HttpGet("InitialAnimals")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<AnimalResponse>>> GetInitialAnimals()

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<AnimalResponse>>>

A list of five animals with randomly generated stats.

Remarks

Example response:

[
    {
        "id": "9ba34383-7266-45d7-aa60-c5cef8ddabf0",
        "name": "Yago",
        "typeAnimal": "FLY",
        "age": 1,
        "weight": 0,
        "height": 2,
        "health": "HEALTHY",
        "value": 8
    }
]

GetValues() 

[HttpGet("GetValues")]
public ActionResult GetValues()

Returns

ActionResult

RemoveAnimal(Guid)

Deletes an animal by its ID

[HttpDelete("Remove/{id}")]
public ActionResult RemoveAnimal(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

Returns

ActionResult

Message if the delete was successfully or not

Remarks

Example request:

DELETE /Animal/Remove/{Id}
{
    "id": "9ba34383-7266-45d7-aa60-c5cef8ddabf0"
}

Example response:

{
    "message": "Animal deleted successfully."
}

SellAnimal(Guid) 

[HttpPost("Sell")]
public Task<ActionResult> SellAnimal(Guid Id)

Parameters

Id Guid

Returns

Task<ActionResult>
Made with docfx
